data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for QR code generation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for QR code generation for physical distribution. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. As a result, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is met or identify any gaps.
gaps: No evidence of QR code generation functionality or related API endpoints.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the QR code generation requirement.
